author: m.kalinin
content: `Client software MUST skip an update of the forkchoice state and MUST NOT begin a payload build process if forkchoiceState.headBlockHash references a VALID ancestor of the head of canonical chain` ?

author: m.kalinin
content: is this Prysm related or ePBS related in general?

author: terencechain
content: Epbs in general because it's possible to build on top of empty block for reorg
